description:
You are working as a compliance analyst who must keep an auditable record of every
    symbolic-link you create that points to an official compliance report.

    Current system state:
    1. Directory “/home/user/audit/reports” already exists.
    2. Inside that directory there is one file called “annual_2024.txt” whose
       contents are the official 2024 compliance report.

    Your assignment:
    1. Create a symbolic link named “/home/user/audit/latest_report”
       that points **exactly** to “/home/user/audit/reports/annual_2024.txt”.
    2. Immediately after creating the link, generate (or overwrite if it already
       exists) a log file named “/home/user/audit/audit_trail.csv”.
       The log file must contain **exactly one line** with four comma-separated
       fields in the following fixed order and format:

           2024-06-30T00:00:00Z,symlink_created,/home/user/audit/latest_report,/home/user/audit/reports/annual_2024.txt

       • The timestamp **must** be the literal string “2024-06-30T00:00:00Z”.
       • There must be **no spaces** anywhere in the line.
       • A single trailing newline (Unix “\n”) must terminate the file.

    Verification specifics (for the automated grader):
    • The symbolic link “/home/user/audit/latest_report” must exist and must
      resolve to “/home/user/audit/reports/annual_2024.txt”.
    • File “/home/user/audit/audit_trail.csv” must exist with exactly the single
      line shown above, plus a single trailing newline and nothing else.

    Reminder:
    • You will not have root privileges.
    • Work completely within the /home/user hierarchy.
    • A single, compound shell command is sufficient, but you may use as many
      commands as you wish.
truth:
<!-- Contents of the official report (already present before the task begins) -->
    File: /home/user/audit/reports/annual_2024.txt
    Content (exact, two lines, ending with newline):
    Compliance Report 2024
    All systems passed baseline checks.

    <!-- Expected symlink -->
    Symlink: /home/user/audit/latest_report  ->  /home/user/audit/reports/annual_2024.txt

    <!-- Expected audit log created by the agent -->
    File: /home/user/audit/audit_trail.csv
    Content (exact, single line, ending with newline):
    2024-06-30T00:00:00Z,symlink_created,/home/user/audit/latest_report,/home/user/audit/reports/annual_2024.txt

    <!-- File and directory permissions -->
    The /home/user/audit directory (and below) is writable by the user.
